title: Backrooms Blocks
body:
This mod adds blocks from various Backrooms levels, for use in Backrooms-themed maps.
Current Levels:
- Level 0 (The Lobby)
- Level 1 (Habitable Zone)
- Level 2 (Pipe Dreams)
- Level 5 (Terror Hotel)
- Level 6 (Lights Out)
- Level 26 (Otherworldly)
- Level 37 (Sublimity)
- Level -1 (Grayscale Halls)
